props.heading: The canonical layer first.
props.body: Every course is a full Kindle textbook priced at one dollar — free if you have Kindle Unlimited — not a teaser with an upsell at the end. The complete video lectures are free on the Humanitarians AI YouTube. And every slide deck runs as a voiced, animated page on their site. That is the whole course, not a sample.

props.heading: When you need your own version — your program's examples, your institutional bra
props.body: They quote you a price. What ships is a zip: the base videos, the exam banks, and the rights to transform the content into your book, your course, your workshop.

props.heading: The zip opens in any CLI — Claude Code, Codex, whatever ships next year.
props.body: Point your tools at it, rename sections, reorder modules, rewrite examples for your field. You're not locked to their software, because there isn't any. The starting point is theirs; what you make of it is yours.

props.heading: Quick predict before the next claim.
props.body: If you work inside a university learning management system — specifically Canvas — guess what the zip exports to. Think about the format and commit to a guess before the reveal.

props.heading: Canvas.
props.body: The zip exports a .imscc cartridge — Canvas's native import format. Upload it, confirm, and your course is standing with modules, videos, and exams in place. And if you'd rather have people run it for you: custom training from their instructors, or a white-label workshop your own experts can deliver.

artifactLines: Canonical: $1 Kindle textbook (free on Kindle Unlimited) · free YouTube videos · voiced animated decks.
Custom: email info@humanitarians.ai for a quote — the zip ships base videos, exams, transform rights.
Yours: opens in any CLI · exports .imscc straight into Canvas · white-label workshops available.
From a 501(c)(3): purchases fund fellows, mentorship, and free AI education.
Phase gate: we build the base · you make it yours · your experts deliver it.

props.command: List the Humanitarians AI courses at humanitarians.ai/courses, find the one closest to what I teach, and show me its three canonical forms: the $1 Kindle book, the YouTube playlist, and the voiced deck on the site.

props.title: AI+1.
props.subline: your course, your version · every course free on this channel
